params.name: describedBy
params.description: One or more element IDs to add to the `aria-describedby` attribute, used to provide additional descriptive information for screen reader users when the supporting text sits outside the fieldset.

params.name: legend
params.description: Options for the legend. In most cases you should supply either `text` or `html` so the grouped question is announced correctly.

params.name: text
params.description: If `html` is set, this is not required. Plain text content for the legend.

params.name: html
params.description: If `text` is set, this is not required. HTML content for the legend, for example when you need visually hidden text or other inline markup.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the legend. Leave this empty for the default legend styling, or use the built-in size modifiers such as `ofh-fieldset__legend--s`, `--m`, `--l`, and `--xl` to match the question hierarchy.

params.name: isPageHeading
params.description: Whether the legend also acts as the heading for the page. Use this when the grouped question is the main page heading.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the fieldset container.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes, IDs, or ARIA attributes) to add to the fieldset container.
